s2.tag: Delicious bites, delightful sips, every time
s2.title: Happy Hour Done Right
s2.subtitle: .Flights. Bites. Pours.
s2.desc: You work hard during the week—now it’s time to sip back and relax. Join us for Happy Hour from 4–6pm with great wine, bites, and end-of-day vibes.

cards.title: West Chester Wednesdays
cards.text: $10 house pours of red, white, or rosé—plus Happy Hour Food Menu all day—exclusively for those who live or work in West Chester.

cards.title: Thirsty Thursday
cards.text: $5 off wine flights, $10 off bottles (on-prem), and $1 off beer—plus our full Happy Hour food menu.

cards.title: 9 for 5 Fridays
cards.text: Get select 9oz pours for the price of a 5oz glass, $1 off beer—plus our full Happy Hour food menu.
